prompt: Write a paragraph about your favorite season. Do not use any punctuation whatsoever. No periods, commas, apostrophes, question marks, exclamation points, or any other punctuation marks.
response: My favorite season is autumn because there is something truly magical about the way the world transforms into a canvas of warm colors like deep reds bright oranges and golden yellows I love the feeling of the cool crisp air on my face as I walk through a park covered in fallen leaves and the sound they make crunching beneath my feet is so satisfying The temperature is perfect during autumn because it is not too hot and not too cold which makes it ideal for spending time outdoors I also enjoy the cozy feeling that comes with the shorter days when you can curl up with a warm blanket and a good book while sipping hot apple cider There is a sense of calm and reflection that autumn brings as nature slowly prepares for the quiet of winter and I find that incredibly peaceful and inspiring
